name: SplitPane

aliases.name: HtmlDetails
aliases.comment: Lets you specify attributes such as style and children for the splitter element
aliases.type: { attributes : List (Attribute msg), children : List (Html msg) }

values.name: createCustomSplitter
values.comment:
Creates a custom splitter.

        myCustomSplitter : CustomSplitter Msg
        myCustomSplitter =
            customSplitter PaneMsg
                { attributes =
                    [ style
                        [ ( "width", "20px" )
                        , ( "height", "20px" )
                        ]
                    ]
                , children =
                    []
                }

values.name: createUpdateConfig
values.comment:
Creates the update configuration.
    Gives you the option to respond to various things that happen.

    For example:
    - Draw a different view when the pane is resized:

        updateConfig
            { onResize (\p -> Just (SwitchViews p))
            , onResizeStarted Nothing
            , onResizeEnded Nothing
            }
values.type: { onResize : Percentage -> Maybe msg, onResizeStarted : Maybe msg, onResizeEnded : Maybe msg } -> UpdateConfig msg

values.name: createViewConfig
values.comment: Creates a configuration for the view.
values.type: { toMsg : Msg -> msg, customSplitter : Maybe (CustomSplitter msg) } -> ViewConfig msg

values.name: customUpdate
values.comment: Updates internal model using custom configuration.
values.type: UpdateConfig msg -> Msg -> State -> ( State, Maybe msg )

values.name: draggable
values.comment: Sets whether the pane is draggable or not

values.name: init
values.comment:
Initialize a new model.

        init Horizontal

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment: Subscribes to relevant events for resizing

values.name: view
values.comment:
A pane with custom splitter.

        view : Model -> Html Msg
        view =
            SplitPane.view viewConfig firstView secondView


        viewConfig : ViewConfig Msg
        viewConfig =
            createViewConfig
                { toMsg = PaneMsg
                , customSplitter = Nothing
                }


        myCustomSplitter : CustomSplitter Msg
        myCustomSplitter =
            customSplitter PaneMsg
                { attributes =
                    [ style
                        [ ( "width", "20px" )
                        , ( "height", "20px" )
                        ]
                    ]
                , children =
                    []
                }


        firstView : Html a
        firstView =
            img [ src "http://4.bp.blogspot.com/-s3sIvuCfg4o/VP-82RkCOGI/AAAAAAAALSY/509obByLvNw/s1600/baby-cat-wallpaper.jpg" ] []


        secondView : Html a
        secondView =
            img [ src "http://2.bp.blogspot.com/-pATX0YgNSFs/VP-82AQKcuI/AAAAAAAALSU/Vet9e7Qsjjw/s1600/Cat-hd-wallpapers.jpg" ] []
values.type: ViewConfig msg -> Html msg -> Html msg -> State -> Html msg
